directory.description: Target directory for the component folder

exportFromIndex.description: Whether to append an export to packages/ui/src/index.ts

inlineTemplate.description: Inline the template in @Component (true) or emit a sibling <name>.html and use templateUrl (false)

inlineStyle.description: Inline the styles in @Component (true) or emit a sibling <name>.css and use styleUrl (false)
